title: Fancy View Model
description: View Model is a client-side mod that lets you customize and visualize the first-person item view model in real time, perfect for showcasing textures, recording videos, and enhancing visual presentation
body:
View Model is a lightweight, client-side Minecraft mod designed to improve and customize the first-person view model of items held in your hand.

This mod allows you to visually adjust and display how items appear in first person without constantly opening menus, making it especially useful for:

Texture pack creators

Content creators and video recording

Showcasing items and animations

Players who want a cleaner or more customized first-person experience

With View Model, the item position, rotation, and movement can be displayed clearly on screen, allowing better visualization of textures and models while playing or recording.

✨ Features

Real-time first-person view model visualization

Easy in-game configuration using the V key

No need to open menus to preview changes

Ideal for texture packs, showcases, and videos

Lightweight and performance-friendly

Client-side only (no server required)

📌 Notes

This mod is purely visual and does not affect gameplay mechanics

Best used for presentation, customization, and creative purposes

View Model focuses on giving creators and players better control and visibility over the first-person item rendering, making Minecraft look cleaner, more expressive, and easier to showcase.
